owner_operator_stated: Dr. Thomas Gibbs founded the office in 1978; his daughter Dr. Jessica Gibbs now practices alongside him under the brand 'Smile Glen Ellyn' — consistent with named entity Thomas R Gibbs DDS PC.
notes: Practice operates under the consumer brand 'Smile Glen Ellyn' rather than the legal PC name. Address (26 N Park Blvd) and phone (630-858-8800) match exactly; vendor hint (Smileglenellyn.Com) was correct for this row. No careers/hiring page found on the site.

owner_operator_stated: Web search results indicate the record's phone (630) 858-1232 and street (493 Duane St, Suite 103) belong to 'Glen Ellyn Smiles', run by Dr. Robin Jungblut, DDS — NOT the named entity. The named entity 'CHAD C. DROUIN, D.M.D., P.C.' is instead an oral & maxillofacial surgery practice branded 'Glen Ellyn Implant and Oral Surgery Center', also at 493 Duane St but a different suite/phone (~630-858-5755).
notes: 493 Duane St is a multi-suite medical building housing at least two unrelated dental practices. The record's exact phone number resolves to 'Glen Ellyn Smiles' (general/family/pediatric dentistry, Dr. Robin Jungblut), a different practice from the named entity, which is an oral surgery practice operating as 'Glen Ellyn Implant and Oral Surgery Center'. Direct WebFetch of both candidate sites failed (SSL certificate error on dentistinglenellyn.com; HTTP 403 on glenellynoralsurgery.com) so this conclusion rests on web search result snippets/titles, not a loaded page. Vendor hint (Dentistinglenellyn.Com) pointed at the conflicting practice, not the named entity. Flagged per successor/ownership-conflict rule.
